cash_pressure: not_applicable; this is quote quality and execution-validity review
leverage_risk: medium; GGLL remains the active leveraged ETF risk valve and requires executable quote validation
opposite_exposure_risk: low; SOXS, SOXL, UGL, INTC, TSLQ, and GDXU are closed or no-reentry without a new rule
weak_position_drag: medium; NVDA and GLD require quote-type-aware defense checks
legacy_position_risk: low-to-medium; cleanup positions remain closed but quote confusion can create stale execution pressure
bot_strategy_risk: low; ZEC grid remains closed and no reopening is allowed
rule_compliance: quote type tagging remains mandatory before treating a price as trigger-valid or execution-valid
redeployment_readiness: blocked_for_new_buying; no new U.S. equity or crypto buying in this checkpoint
key_findings: Quote Type Tagging remains critical for regular close, night-session quote, premarket executable quote, and regular-session executable quote.
Night-session or watchlist quotes can inform monitoring but should not automatically trigger execution.
GGLL, NVDA, and GLD rules require quote type and execution validity before action.
SOXL, INTC, and UGL are closed_position and should not be reopened without a new approved rule.
Broker/Binance screenshots remain source of truth; external market data is cross-check context only.
recommended_next_actions: Tag every rule input with quote_type before deriving execution intent.
Keep closed positions separated from active risk valves.
Use regular-session executable quotes for actual order decisions.
Show quote-type warnings in future cockpit summaries.
